DECLARATION OF IAN KELLEY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DEEM ADMISSIONS ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100097977) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRESTI, SCOTT

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SCOTT PRESTI'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES OF DEFENDANT TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED AND IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT KENT SILLIMAN IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE VERIFIED WRITTEN RESPONSES-WITHOUT OBJECTIONS-TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), AND TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE) WITHIN 14 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. SILLIMAN IS ORDERED TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $1,125, THE AMOUNT INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE THE MOVING PAPERS. (CODE CIV. PROC., 2023.010, 2023.040, 2030.290.) SILLIMAN MUST MAIL A CHECK MADE PAYABLE TO THE CLIENT TRUST FUND OF BRYANT LAW GROUP IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,125 TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF WITHIN 14 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER.PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) VIA EMAIL TO ADRIENNELEIGHT@HOTMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ADRIENNE ROGERS, CLERK: ANNIE PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SCOTT PRESTI'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS OF DEFENDANT ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED AND IS GRANTED IN PART. SILLIMAN DID NOT RESPOND TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS OR SERVE A PROPOSED RESPONSE IN SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 2033.220 BEFORE THE HEARING ON THE MOTION. ALL OBJECTIONS TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE WAIVED. THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE DEEMED ADMITTED AGAINST SILLIMAN. SILLIMAN IS ORDERED TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $900, THE AMOUNT INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE THE MOVING PAPERS. (CODE CIV. PROC., 2023.010, 2023.040, 2033.280.) SILLIMAN MUST MAIL A CHECK MADE PAYABLE TO THE CLIENT TRUST FUND OF BRYANT LAW GROUP IN THE AMOUNT OF $900 TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF WITHIN 14 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) VIA EMAIL TO ADRIENNELEIGHT@HOTMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ADRIENNE ROGERS, CLERK: ANNIE PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses Of Defendant To Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SCOTT PRESTI's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses Of Defendant To Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions

The motion to compel is unopposed and is GRANTED in part. Defendant Kent Silliman is ordered to provide verified written responses-without objections-to form interrogatories (set one), and to requests for production of documents (set one) within 14 days of service of notice of entry of this order. Silliman is ordered to pay monetary sanctions of $1,125, the amount incurred by plaintiff to prepare the moving papers. (Code Civ. Proc., 2023.010, 2023.040, 2030.290.) Silliman must mail a check made payable to the Client Trust Fund of Bryant Law Group in the amount of $1,125 to counsel for plaintiff within 14 days of service of notice of entry of this order.

Prevailing party to submit proposed order in WORD format in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) via email to adrienneleight@hotmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Adrienne Rogers, Clerk: Annie Pascual, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Of Defendant Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SCOTT PRESTI's Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Of Defendant Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions

The RFA motion is unopposed and is GRANTED in part. Silliman did not respond to the requests for admissions or serve a proposed response in substantial compliance with Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.220 before the hearing on the motion. All objections to the requests for admission are waived. The requests for admission are deemed admitted against Silliman. Silliman is ordered to pay monetary sanctions of $900, the amount incurred by plaintiff to prepare the moving papers. (Code Civ. Proc., 2023.010, 2023.040, 2033.280.) Silliman must mail a check made payable to the Client Trust Fund of Bryant Law Group in the amount of $900 to counsel for plaintiff within 14 days of service of notice of entry of this order.

Prevailing party to submit proposed order in WORD format in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) via email to adrienneleight@hotmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Adrienne Rogers, Clerk: Annie Pascual, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
